title: Better Baby Eyes
description: This resource pack changes the eyes of the newly added baby mobs to better match their adult versions along with some unnecessary changes
body:
Didn't like the new baby mobs eyes? Well, this resource pack might save you from never playing minecraft again after the update that ruined it forever.

Jokes aside, this is a simple and self-explanatory resource pack, there's also some small changes that aren't completely related to mob eyes, but I wanted to have the opportunity to add them too, such as giving the baby squids their regular teeth back, instead of having a little baby tooth

![pigs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feebb7ff73a412189af2c568a1e461e5bc08ac7b.png)
